installation.title: Installation
installation.subtitle: Mood-UI is installed as a standard npm package. Compatible with Vue 3.5+ and Tailwind CSS v4.
installation.step2Desc: Make sure you have Vue 3.5+ and Tailwind CSS v4 installed:
installation.step3Desc: Import {code} after Tailwind. This registers the design tokens and all utilities used by the components.
installation.step3Tip: Tip: mood-ui uses {themeInline} to map its CSS vars to Tailwind tokens. You don't need to configure anything in {tailwindConfig}.
installation.step4Desc: {code} propagates theming, language and tokens to all descendants. Only one is needed per application (though you can nest them for local themes).
installation.step5Desc: Import any component from the package root. Everything is tree-shakeable, so only what you actually use is included in your bundle.
installation.themeCardDesc: Color, radius, surfaces, dark mode presets…
